case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ADINA, MARY

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-16-2002, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ADINA, MARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADINA, MARY $998.11 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,024.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $998.11 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ADINA, MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ADINA, MARY PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO VACATING THE JUDGMENT AND DISMISSING THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ADINA, MARY HEARING SET FOR AUG-16-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
